fields.Name: Image
fields.Description: Image content (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, etc.). Delivered inline as image_url for vision-capable models. ForceToolsOnly per-instance opts out of inline delivery — note that no tool exists today to re-feed bytes back into the model's vision pipeline, so ToolsOnly on multimodal artifacts means the LLM only sees bytes as a tool result, not as a native image.
